Our Ministries

Helping Pastors & Building Churches

Providing resources for local ministers and building homes for spiritual growth.

Village Transformation

We don't only build walls.
We build places of hope.

Local pastors serve with faith, prayer, and sacrifice. This ministry stands beside them by providing support, encouragement, and church spaces where believers can worship, grow, and serve their villages.

Spiritual Homes

A church becomes a light of Christ in its village.

Churches Built

12

Each building becomes a place for worship, discipleship, prayer, and community transformation.

Pastors Helped

Supporting those who faithfully serve the remote regions.

01

The Foundation

Constructing places of worship where believers can gather, pray, grow, and be strengthened in faith.

02

Support the Sent

Providing encouragement and practical resources for local pastors serving faithfully in villages.

03

Building the Body

Establishing strong pillars of faith that become spiritual homes for families and communities.

04

Partnering for Growth

Helping local churches thrive, expand, and continue reaching people with the love of Christ.

More Than a Building

A home for
worship.

“

A church in a village becomes a witness of Christ, a shelter for prayer, and a foundation for transformed lives.

Our Purpose

Helping local churches
thrive and expand.

When pastors are supported and churches are strengthened, families are discipled, children are taught, and villages experience the compassion of Christ.

Places of worship are established.

Local pastors receive encouragement.

Families gather for prayer and discipleship.

Villages witness the love of Jesus.

✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”

📞304 620 1974☎+91 7399577999✉saviorsheartbeatin@gmail.com
📍Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India
